_metadata.description: UK Exam Board Specification PDF URLs and DfE National Curriculum documents
notes: URLs marked with VERIFIED were confirmed returning HTTP 200 with correct content-type
URLs marked with NEEDS_VERIFICATION could not be confirmed via automated scraping (JS-rendered pages)
Pearson/Edexcel relative paths should be prefixed with https://qualifications.pearson.com
OCR relative paths should be prefixed with https://www.ocr.org.uk
WJEC/Eduqas specs could not be scraped due to heavy JS rendering - landing pages provided instead

eyfs.name: Early Years Foundation Stage Statutory Framework

religious_education.note: RE is not part of the National Curriculum but is compulsory. Non-statutory guidance provided.

gcse.name: Art and Design (includes Fine Art, Textile Design, 3D Design, Photography, Graphic Communication)
gcse.spec_pdf: NEEDS_VERIFICATION - AQA Art GCSE spec PDF could not be located via automated scraping. Check subject page.

a_level.name: Art and Design (includes Fine Art, Textile Design, 3D Design, Photography, Graphic Communication)
a_level.spec_pdf: NEEDS_VERIFICATION - AQA Art A Level spec PDF could not be located via automated scraping. Check subject page.

a_level.note: AQA does not offer A Level Drama - they offer A Level Drama and Theatre (see drama_and_theatre)
AQA offers Design and Technology: Product Design at A Level
a_level.name: Design and Technology: Product Design

statistics.note: AQA does not offer GCSE Statistics

information_technology.note: AQA does not offer a standalone IT qualification at GCSE or A Level

textiles.note: Covered under Art and Design endorsement 8205 (GCSE Textile Design)

photography.note: Covered under Art and Design endorsement 8204 (GCSE Photography)

three_d_design.note: Covered under Art and Design endorsement 8206 (GCSE Three-Dimensional Design)

a_level.note: This appears to be the AS spec but may be the combined AS/A Level document

wjec_eduqas.note: WJEC/Eduqas specification PDFs could not be scraped via curl due to heavy JavaScript rendering. Landing pages are provided - spec PDFs must be downloaded manually from each subject page.

information_technology.note: WJEC offers Level 1/2 and Level 3 Digital Technology qualifications
